name: hq-installer
description: Zero-friction native installer that gets non-technical users from download to working my-hq in under 5 minutes with no terminal commands

userStories.title: Identify minimal dependency set
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to identify the absolute minimum dependencies required to run my-hq so that we don't bloat the installer with unnecessary software
acceptanceCriteria: Document which my-hq features require Git (if any)
Document which features require GitHub CLI (if any)
Confirm Node.js version requirement (18+)
Confirm Claude CLI is required
List any other runtime dependencies (pnpm?)
Write findings to projects/hq-installer/research/minimal-deps.md
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-01-30. Essential deps: Node.js 18+, Claude CLI. Optional: Git, gh, qmd, pnpm.

userStories.title: Create Windows installer with NSIS
userStories.description: As a non-technical Windows user, I want to download and run a .exe installer so that I can set up my-hq without using the command line
acceptanceCriteria: NSIS installer script created in installer/windows/
Installer has branded UI with progress indicators
Detects if Node.js is installed, installs if missing (embedded or download)
Detects if Claude CLI is installed, installs via npm if missing
Prompts user for install location with sensible default
Creates Start Menu shortcut
Installer is code-signed (or documented how to sign)
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-01-30. NSIS script with MUI2 UI, Node.js/Claude CLI detection and auto-install, Start Menu shortcuts. Code signing documented in CODE-SIGNING.md.

userStories.title: Create macOS installer package
userStories.description: As a non-technical macOS user, I want to download and run a .pkg installer so that I can set up my-hq without using Terminal
acceptanceCriteria: macOS .pkg installer created in installer/macos/
Installer has branded UI with progress indicators
Detects if Node.js is installed, installs if missing (via embedded or brew)
Detects if Claude CLI is installed, installs via npm if missing
Prompts user for install location with sensible default
Handles macOS Gatekeeper prompts gracefully
Adds shell PATH entries for installed tools

userStories.title: Implement Claude CLI browser OAuth flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want to authenticate Claude CLI by logging into claude.ai in my browser so that I don't have to manually copy API keys
acceptanceCriteria: Installer opens browser to Claude OAuth URL
Installer waits for OAuth callback or polls for completion
On success, Claude CLI is configured and ready to use
On failure/skip, shows clear message about manual setup later
Works on both Windows and macOS

userStories.title: Download and configure my-hq template
userStories.description: As a user, I want the installer to set up my-hq folder automatically so that I'm ready to use it immediately after install
acceptanceCriteria: Downloads latest my-hq starter template (zip from GitHub releases or embedded)
Extracts to user-chosen location
Runs any necessary npm install or setup scripts
Does NOT require Git to be installed
Creates desktop shortcut or launcher

userStories.title: Run post-install setup wizard
userStories.description: As a new user, I want a friendly setup wizard after install so that I can configure my-hq for my needs
acceptanceCriteria: Opens GUI or terminal-based wizard after install completes
Collects user name/preferences for agents.md
Offers to run /setup command
Shows 'Getting Started' guide with next steps
Can be skipped if user wants to configure manually later

userStories.title: Implement auto-update mechanism
userStories.description: As a user, I want the installer to check for updates automatically so that I always have the latest version
acceptanceCriteria: Installer checks for updates on launch (version endpoint or GitHub releases)
If update available, prompts user to download/install
Auto-downloads and installs update with user consent
Update preserves user's my-hq data and configuration
Works on both Windows and macOS

userStories.title: Create download landing page
userStories.description: As a potential user, I want a simple download page so that I can easily get the right installer for my platform
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page auto-detects OS and shows appropriate download button
Shows system requirements
Provides manual/advanced installation instructions
Includes FAQ for common issues
Can be hosted on GitHub Pages

userStories.title: Test installer on clean machines
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the installer works on fresh OS installations so that real users don't encounter issues
acceptanceCriteria: Test on clean Windows 10 VM - installer completes successfully
Test on clean Windows 11 VM - installer completes successfully
Test on clean macOS VM or fresh user - installer completes successfully
Verify Claude CLI works after install
Verify my-hq runs correctly
Document any edge cases or workarounds

metadata.goal: Enable non-technical professionals to set up my-hq in under 5 minutes with zero terminal commands
metadata.successCriteria: User downloads installer, runs it, and has working my-hq with Claude CLI ready - no terminal commands needed
